benefits.description: Lost ~85 lbs over approximately 4 years, going from ~270 lbs to 185 lbs at ~10% BF with visible abs

protocol_notes: User references their own transformation (270 lbs to 185 lbs, ~10% BF over 4 years) while giving general advice. Does not specify Reta was part of their own protocol; may be general experience. Recommends starting at 1mg/week and adjusting based on results and side effects.
